source_texts: 하고 바깥을 내다본다. 시꺼먼 구름이 잔뜩 끼어 별 하나 찾을 수 없는 하늘을 쳐다보다가,
하고 형의 얼굴을 바로 쳐다보지를 못한다.
"어서 더 자거라. 이 담버텀 챙기면 고만이지…… 다 형의 잘못이다."
하고 문을 닫는다. 그러다가 아우가 엎드리며 머리맡을 더듬으니까, 얼핏 자리끼 사발을 집어서 입에 대어 준다. 동화는 조갈이 심하게 나던 판이라 목을 늘이고 숭늉 한 사발을 벌떡벌떡 들이켜고는 다시 쓰러진다.
비가 제법 장마 때처럼 주룩주룩 쏟아지기 시작한다. 동혁은 일종의 신비감을 느끼어 노래라도 한마디 부르고 싶었다.
십 년 만에 만나는 친구의 음성인들 이 빗소리보다 더 반가우랴. 흉년이 들겠다고 벌써부터 쌀금 보릿금이 오르고 초목의 새싹이 지지리 타들어 가도록, 온갖 생물이 목말라 하던 대지 위에 뚝뚝 떨어지는 빗방울 소리와, 그 비를 휘몰고 들어오는 선들바람의 교향악! 그것은 오직 하늘의 처분만 바라고 사는 농민의 귀에라야 각별히 반갑게 들리는 소리다.
안방에서는 늙은 양주도 잠이 깨었는지 이야기하는 소리가 두런두런한다.
동혁은 창 밖으로 팔을 내밀고 천금을 주고도 그 한 방울을 살 수 없는 생명수를 손바닥에 받아 본다. 자리옷을 활활 벗어 버리고 뛰어나가서 그 비에 온몸을 골고루 적시다가 땅 위에 디굴디굴 구르고 싶은 충동을 느꼈다.

- Source flow: Scene opens at a crowded reception for student enlightenment members returning from summer campaigns. After a formal welcome by the newspaper editor, Park Dong-hyeok (agriculture student) gives a passionate report on his rural literacy efforts, culminating in a radical speech urging intellectuals to abandon aloofness, unify ideology ('Vnarod'), and fight internal despair. His speech triggers applause and a dissenting shout ('deviation'), causing a near-riot until he demands post-meeting debate. The moderator warns against mixing enlightenment with ideology. Next, Chae Yeong-sin (theological student) is called; she initially refuses to speak, criticizing the gendered order and potential censorship, before reluctantly standing.
- Target flow: Narrative maintains a vivid, descriptive tone for the setting (stuffy hall, tanned faces) shifting to high-register, rhetorical intensity for Dong-hyeok's speech. Dialogue captures the clash between formal moderation and radical fervor. Chae Yeong-sin's refusal is rendered with sharp, firm dialogue contrasting with the moderator's awkward attempts at humor.
- Style continuity: High contrast between descriptive narration (sensory details of heat, sound) and polemical speechmaking. Dong-hyeok's voice is baritone, forceful, and ideological; the moderator is diplomatic but increasingly flustered. Chae Yeong-sin is concise, defiant, and intellectually sharp. Maintain distinct registers for the 'clown' guitarist vs. the serious activists.
- Discourse state: Open conflict regarding the scope of the movement (literacy only vs. ideological revolution). The meeting is unresolved; Chae Yeong-sin has just stood to speak after a standoff. The tension between 'enlightenment' and 'ideology' is the central unresolved theme.
- Open references: Park Dong-hyeok's challenge to debate after the meeting / Chae Yeong-sin's pending speech and her criticism of gender ordering / The specific dissenting shout labeling Dong-hyeok's views as 'deviation' / The moderator's warning about the current political climate
- Memory reason: Establishes the setting, key characters (Park Dong-hyeok, Chae Yeong-sin), and the escalating ideological tension between enlightenment education and political activism that drives the scene's conflict.

"Although I was deeply impressed by what you said at the reception, and though I was born in the countryside and have lived away from it for several years, now that I have gone directly into the rural villages, I tell you, their living conditions are beyond words. They are several times more miserable than what is talked about in newspapers or magazines."
- source: "간담회 석상에서 영신 씨가 허신 말씀을 듣구 감복을 했지만, 내가 농촌의 태생이면 서두 여러 해 나와 있다가 직접 농촌 속으루 들어가 보니까, 참말 그네들의 사는 형편이 말씀이 아니에요. 신문이나 잡지에서 떠드는 것버덤 몇 곱절 비참하거든요."
  target: Having said this, he paused for a long while, swallowed dryly, and then, as if he had made up his mind long ago, said,
- source: 하고 한참이나 뜸을 들이다가 마른침을 삼키더니 오래 전부터 각오를 하고 있었던 것처럼,
  target: "I want to voluntarily withdraw from school."
- source: "난 자진해서 학교를 퇴학허고 싶어요."
  target: he said, before falling into thought once more. Yeong-sin, who had been listening intently to Dong-hyeok's words while gazing at the fireflies flickering in the forest, suddenly lifted her face and said,
- source: 하고는 다시금 생각에 잠긴다. 숲속에서 반득이는 반딧불을 들여다보며 동혁의 말에 귀를 기울이고 있던 영신은 얼굴을 번쩍 들며,
  target: Having said this, she fell into thought again. Yeong-sin, who had been listening intently to Dong-hyeok's words while gazing at the fireflies flickering in the forest, suddenly lifted her face and said,
- source: "왜요? 일년 반만 더 댕기시면 졸업을 허실 텐데요?"
  target: "Why? You would graduate if you attended for just another year and a half, wouldn't you?"
- source: 하고 놀라운 듯 눈을 크게 뜬다.
  target: she said, widening her eyes in surprise.
- source: "고만둘 수밖에 없어요. 중학교 때엔 억지를 쓰구 별별 짓을 다 해가면서 고학을 했지만, 나 하나 공부를 시키느라구 아버지는 올봄까지 대대루 내려오던 집 앞 논까지 거진 다 팔으셨에요. 졸업만 하면 큰 수가 날 줄 알구 계량할 것두 아니 남기신 모양인데, 내가 졸업이라 구 헌댔자 바루 취직두 허기 어렵지만, 무슨 기수(技手)라는 명색이 붙대야 월급이라 군 고작 사오십 원밖에 안 될 테니, 그걸 가지구 객지에서 물 밥 사먹어 가며, 양복 해 입구  소위 교제비까지 써가면서 수다 식구를 먹여 살릴 수가 있겠어요? 되레 빚만 지게 되지요.
  target: "I have no choice but to quit. During middle school, I forced my way through and did all sorts of things to support myself through school, but to educate just me, my father has sold off nearly all the rice paddies in front of our house that had been passed down through generations, right up until this spring. He seemed to think that once I graduated, a great turn of fortune would come, so he didn't even leave enough for funeral expenses. But even if I do graduate, it will be difficult to find immediate employment. Even if I get a position with the title of 'technician,' the monthly salary would be a mere forty or fifty won. With that, do you think I can support my large family while living away from home, buying rice and water, tailoring Western suits, and even spending on so-called social expenses? I would only end up in debt.
- source: 그러니까 나머지 땅마지기나 밭날갈이를 깡그리 팔어 없애구서 거산을 허게 되기 전에 하루바삐 집으루 돌아가서 넘어진 기둥을 버티고 다시 일으켜 세울 도리를 차려야겠에요. 까딱 허면 굶어 죽게 될 형편이니까요."
  target: "Therefore, before we are forced to sell off the remaining plots of land or fields and become completely destitute, I must return home immediately to find a way to support the fallen pillar and raise it up again. If I am not careful, we face the prospect of starving to death."
- source: "……"
  target: "..."
- source: 영신은 동혁이의 사정도 딱하거니와, 그만 못지않게 말이 아닌 저의 집의 형편을 생각 하느라고 말대답도 아니 하고 있다가 한참 만에야 한숨을 섞어,
  target: Yeong-sin felt pity for Dong-hyeok's situation, but she was equally preoccupied with her own family's circumstances, which were no less dire. Unable to even reply, she remained silent for a long while before finally saying with a sigh,
- source: "제 사정은 백선생밖에는 아무헌테두 말한 적이 없어요. 홀로 되신 우리 어머니는 육십 노인이 딸 하나 공부를 시키느라구 입때 생선 광주리를 이고 댕기세요. 올 여름엔 더위를 잡숫고 길바닥에 가 쓰러지신 걸, 동네 사람들이 업어다가 눕혀 드렸어요. 그렇건만 약 한 첩변 변히……."
  target: "I have never told my situation to anyone except Mr. Baek. My mother, who is alone, is a sixty-year-old woman who still carries a basket of fish on her head to make a living so that her daughter can study. This summer, she suffered from the heat and collapsed on the street; neighbors had to carry her on their backs and lay her down. Yet, she couldn't even afford a single dose of medicine..."
- source: 그는 고만 목이 메었다가 간신히 입술을 떨며,
  target: Her voice choked up, and trembling her lips with difficulty, she continued,
- source: "정신을 잃으신 동안에 어느 몹쓸놈이 푼푼이 모아 넣으신 돈주머니를 끌러 가서 그게 원통 해 밤새두룩 우시는데……!"
  target: "While she had lost consciousness, some wretched fellow untied the money pouch she had saved penny by penny and stole it. She was so aggrieved that she cried all night long...!"
- source: 하고 영신은 가슴속으로부터 치밀어 오는 울음을 참느라고 잇자국이 나도록 손가락을 깨문다.
  target: Having said this, Yeong-sin bit her fingers until they left marks to hold back the tears welling up from deep within her chest.
- source: 동혁은 몹시 우울해졌다. 가슴이 턱 막힌 듯이 갑갑해서 더운 입김을 후― 하고 내뿜는다.
  target: Dong-hyeok became deeply depressed. His chest felt as if it were tightly blocked, and he exhaled a hot breath with a 'Hoo—'.
- source: 숲속의 버러지 소리도, 바위 틈으로 졸졸졸 흘러내리는 샘물 소리도 두 사람의 귀에는 들리지 않는 듯 동혁은, ' 내가 공연히 그런 소리를 끄집어냈구나.’
  target: As if neither the sounds of insects in the forest nor the trickling of spring water flowing through the crevices of rocks reached their ears, Dong-hyeok thought, 'I have unnecessarily brought up such talk.'
- source: 하고 바로 정수리 위에서 황금빛으로 반짝이며 내려다보는 유난히 큰 별을 원망스러이 쳐다보다가 영신의 앞으로 다가앉으며,
  target: Having said this, he looked resentfully at an unusually large star shining with golden light directly above his head, then moved closer to sit in front of Yeong-sin and said,
- source: "자, 우린 그런 생각은 고만 허십시다. 어쨌든 우리는 명색 전문학교까지 댕겨 보니까, 여간 행복된 사람들이 아니지요."
  target: "Come, let us stop having such thoughts. In any case, since we have at least attended a specialized school, we are not ordinary fortunate people."
- source: 하고 목소리 부드러이 영신을 위로한다.
  target: he said, softly comforting Yeong-sin.
- source: "참말 공부니 뭐니 다 집어치구 시굴루 내려가야겠어요. 공부를 한다는 핑계로 서울 와 서나 혼자 편안히 지내는 게 어머니께나 동리 사람들한테까지 큰 죄를 짓는 것 같어요. 첨엔 멋도 모르구서 무슨 성공을 허구야 내려간다고 하나님께 맹세꺼정 허구 올라왔지만 요…… 더군다나 아까 백선생 댁에서 허신 말씀을 듣구, 이제까지 지내 온 걸 여간 뉘우치지 않었어요."
  target: "Indeed, I should give up studying and everything else and go down to the countryside. It feels like a great sin against my mother and even the villagers to come to Seoul under the pretext of studying and live comfortably by myself. At first, without knowing anything, I even made a vow to God that I would achieve something before going down, but now... Especially after hearing what Mr. Baek said at his house earlier, I deeply regret how I have lived until now."
- source: 그 말을 듣자 동혁은 벌떡 일어섰다. 양복 바지에다가 두 손을 찌르고 거진 궐련 한 개를 태울 동안이나 왔다갔다하며 무슨 생각에 잠겼다가 영신의 앞으로 다가서며,
  target: Hearing these words, Dong-hyeok jumped to his feet. With his hands thrust into his suit pants, he paced back and forth for nearly the time it would take to smoke one cigarette, lost in thought, before approaching Yeong-sin and saying,
- source: "영 신 씨!"
  target: "Ms. Yeong-sin!"
- source: 하고 힘차게 부른다.
  target: he called out forcefully.
- source: "우리 둘이 이렇게 만나서 한 십 년이나 사귄 동지처럼 가슴을 터놓구 하룻밤을 새운 기념을 우리 영원히 남기십시다."
  target: "Let us make this night we spent together, opening our hearts like comrades who have known each other for ten years, a memory that will last forever."
- source: 하고 중대한 동의를 한다.
  target: he said, making a solemn proposal.
- source: "어떻게요?"
  target: "How?"
- source: 영신의 눈은 별빛에 새파랗게 빛난다. 동혁은 버썩 대들어 그 소댕 같은 손으로 서슴지 않  고 여자의 두 손을 덥석 잡으며,
  target: Yeong-sin's eyes shone blue in the starlight. Dong-hyeok boldly stepped forward and, without hesitation, firmly grasped the woman's two hands with his large, calloused hands, saying,
- source: "우리 시굴루 내려갑시다! 이번 기회에 공부구 뭐구 다 집어치우구서 우리의 고향을 지키러 내려갑시다! 한 가정을 붙든다느니버덤두 다 쓰러져 가는 우리의 고향을 붙들기 위 한 운동을 일으키기 위해서, 자 용기를 냅시다! 그네들을 위해서 일을 허다가 죽는 한이 있드래두 선구자로서의 기쁨과 자랑만은 남겠지요."
  target: "Let us go down to our countryside! On this occasion, let us abandon our studies and everything else and go down to protect our homeland! Rather than trying to hold onto a single household, let us summon the courage to launch a movement to hold onto our collapsing homeland! Even if we die while working for their sake, the joy and pride of being a pioneer will remain."
- source: 영신이가 무엇에 아찔하게 취한 듯이 눈을 내리감고 있는 것은 불시에 두방망이질을 하는 심장의 고동을 진정하려 함이다. 그는 마주 일어서서 동혁에게 으스러지도록 잡힌 두 손에 힘을 주며,
  target: Yeong-sin closed her eyes as if dizzy from something, trying to calm the pounding of her heart, which was suddenly beating like two mallets. She stood up facing him, putting strength into her two hands that were being crushed in Dong-hyeok's grip, and said,
- source: "고맙습니다! 당신 같으신 동지를 얻게 해주신 하나님께 감사합니다."
  target: "Thank you! I thank God for allowing me to find a comrade like you."
- source: 영신은 더 길게 말하지 않았다. 어느덧 인왕산 너머로 기울어 가는 달빛 아래서 두 남녀의 마주 쏘아보는 네 줄기 시선은 비상한 결심에 빛나고 있었다.
  target: Yeong-sin spoke no further. Under the moonlight already tilting beyond Inwang Mountain, the four lines of sight from the man and woman gazing at each other shone with an extraordinary resolve.
- source: 일적천금(一滴千金)
  target: A single drop is worth a thousand gold.
- source: 날이 가물어서 동리마다 소동이 대단하다. 정월 대보름날은 하루 종일 진눈깨비가 휘 뿌려서 송아지 한 마리를 태우는 윷놀이판에 헤살을 놓았었고, 모처럼 풍물을 차리고 나선 두레 꾼들을 찬비 맞은 족제비 꼴을 만들더니, 그 뒤로 석 달째 접어든 오늘까지 비 한 방울 구경을 못 하였다.
  target: The drought has caused great commotion in every village. On the day of the Daeboreum full moon in the first lunar month, sleet sprayed all day long, ruining the Yutnori board where a calf was being wagered, and turning the farmers who had set out with their wind and percussion instruments for the first time in a while into the likeness of weasels drenched in cold rain. Since then, not a single drop of rain has been seen until today, now entering the third month.
- source: "허어 이 날, 사람을 잡으려구 이렇게 가무는 게여."
  target: "Heavens, is the sky trying to kill people by drying up like this?"
- source: 바싹 마른 흙이 먼지처럼 피어올라 폴삭폴삭 날리는 보리밭에 붓을 주던 박첨지는, 기신 없이 괭이질을 하던 손을 쉬고 허리를 펴며 혼자말로 탄식을 한다. 그는 검버섯이 돋은 이마에 주름살을 잡으며 머리 위를 우러러본다. 그러나 가을날처럼 새파란 하늘에는 구름 한 점 찾아 낼 수가 없다. 바닷가의 메마른 농촌에 바람만 진종일 씽씽 불어서 콧구멍이 막히고 목의 침이 말라드는 것 같다.
  target: While hoeing the barley field where the bone-dry soil rose like dust and fluttered about, Park Cheom-ji stopped his listless hoeing, straightened his back, and sighed to himself. Wrinkling his forehead, which was spotted with age marks, he looked up at the sky. However, not a single cloud could be found in the blue sky, clear as an autumn day. In this dry coastal farming village, the wind blew briskly all day long, making it feel as though his nostrils were blocked and the saliva in his throat was drying up.
- source: "이런 제에기, 보리싹이 연골에 말러 배틀어지니 올 여름엔 냉수만 마시구 산담메."
  target: "Damn it, the barley sprouts are drying up while still tender and turning white; this summer we'll have to survive on cold water alone."
- source: 늙은이는 다시 한번 말과 한숨을 뒤섞어 내뿜고는, 이제야 겨우 강아지풀 잎사귀만하게 꼬리를 흔드는 보리싹을 짚신발로 걷어찬다. 그러다가 화풀이로 쌈지를 긁어 희연 부스러기한 대를 태워 물고 빼끔빼끔 빨다가 괭이 자루에 탁탁 털어 버린다.
  target: The old man exhaled once more, mixing words with a sigh, and then kicked the barley sprouts, which were finally waving their tails no larger than foxtail leaves, with his straw sandals. Then, in a fit of anger, he struck his flint, lit a piece of crushed tobacco stem, took a few puffs, and tapped it out against the hoe handle.
- source: 그는 한참 동안이나 멍하니 섰다가 그래도 하는 수 없다는 듯이 멍에같이 굽은 허리를 주먹으로 두어 번 두드린 뒤에, 손바닥에다 침을 튀튀 뱉더니 다시 괭이를 잡는다.
  target: He stood blankly for quite some time, but as if there were no other choice, he thumped his yoke-like bent back a couple of times with his fist, spat vigorously into his palm, and grabbed the hoe again.
- source: "참 정말 큰일났구려. 참죽나무에 순이 나는 걸 보니깐 못자리 헐 때두 지냈는데, 비 한 방울이나 구경을 해야 허지 않소."
  target: "Truly, this is a great disaster. Seeing the shoots on the Ailanthus tree, the time for preparing the seedbeds has already passed; we must at least see a drop of rain."
- source: 곁두리 때가 훨씬 지나도록 바닷가에서 갯줄나물을 캐어 가지고 들어온 마누라가 영감의 등뒤에서 반나마 기운 광주리를 던지고, 기신없이 밭두덕에 가 주저앉으며 하는 말이다.
  target: It was well past the time for making kimchi, yet his wife, who had been out gathering seaweed by the shore, threw down a basket that was barely half full behind her husband's back and collapsed wearily onto the field ridge, saying:
- source: 앞니가 몽땅 함몰을 해서, 동리 계집애들은 그를 합죽할머니라고 놀린다.
  target: Because all her front teeth had sunken in, the village girls teased her, calling her Grandmother Hapjuk.
- source: "그러게 말요. 이대루 가물다간 기미(己未)년처럼 기우제를 지낸다구 떠들겠는걸."
  target: "That's right. If this drought continues, they'll be talking about holding a rain prayer ceremony just like in the Gi-Mi year."
- source: 박첨지는 마누라를 흘깃 돌려다보고 중얼중얼 군소리하듯 한다.
  target: Park Cheom-ji glanced at his wife and muttered as if complaining to himself.
- source: "너구리굴 보구 피물돈버텀 내쓴다구 동혁이 월급 탈 때만 바라구서 조합 돈꺼정 써놨으니, 참 정말 입맛이 소태 같구려."
  target: "Spending money we don't have just because we saw a raccoon hole, relying only on Dong-hyeok's monthly salary, and even using up the cooperative funds—truly, my mouth tastes as bitter as saltwort."
- source: 영감의 말을 한숨으로 화답하던 마누라는,
  target: His wife, who had responded to her husband's words with a sigh, said:
- source: "그래두 동혁이가 어떡허든지 우리 양주 배야 곯게 하겠수?"
  target: "Even so, no matter what Dong-hyeok does, do you think he would let our bellies go hungry?"
- source: "명색이라두 학교 졸업이나 했으면 모를까, 지금 와서 전들 무슨 뾰죽헌 수가 있나베. 양식이라 구 인젠 묵은 보리 여남은 말이 달랑달랑허는데……."
  target: "If he had at least graduated from school, it would be one thing, but what special plan could he possibly have now? As for food, we only have about eight mal of old barley left, hanging by a thread..."
- source: "아무튼 그 자식이 우리집 기둥인데 조석 때마다 동리 일만 헌다구 몰아세질랑 마슈. 그렇게 성화를 헌다구 말을 들을 듯싶우? 제가 허구 싶어서 허는 노릇을. 목이 말러두 주막에가 서 탁배기 한잔 입에 대지 않는 자식을 가지구서……."
  target: "In any case, don't keep pressing him, saying he only does village work morning and night, when that boy is the pillar of our house.   target: "In any case, we must get rid of that so-called Farmers' Association or Training Center. At least one young man from each house should be home during Dong-hyeok's watch. Will rice or clothes appear just because they gather day and night, whispering conspiracies like traitors?"
